use_cases: Animated hero background for AI product landing pages
3D particle grid background for SaaS marketing sites
Dynamic visual backdrop for tech company hero sections
Post-processing enhanced background for modern web interfaces
Interactive visual element for creative agency portfolios
ai_summary: A 3D WebGL-based hero background component using Three.js with particle/grid rendering, UnrealBloomPass for glow effects, and RGBShiftShader for chromatic aberration. Features a 120x120 grid with jitter animation on a dark canvas, optimized for high-performance with pixel ratio capping. Ideal for AI, SaaS, and tech-forward landing pages requiring immersive animated hero backgrounds.
